column1: # 4x L40S queue (2026-07-03). Fresh machine: runs/ and caches/ did not travel,
# so foundation runs are rebuilt here (doubles as new-hardware replication).
# Fields: done_file <TAB> need_mb <TAB> after <TAB> command [<TAB> n_gpus]
# Big items sit on top so they claim empty cards before small jobs pack them.
# --- gate: tests must be green before any training (CLAUDE.md) ---
# --- premise checks, big models (chained: they share runs/base-eval-full tmp dir; 0.6B control last, stays in place) ---

column4: bash -c '.venv/bin/python scripts/evaluate.py --base --experiment configs/experiments/kd_lora_ce_hi_4b_rag.yaml && mv runs/base-eval-full runs/base-eval-full-4b && .venv/bin/python scripts/premise_gate.py runs/base-eval-full-4b/recite.json 0.7 && touch runs/.premise_4b_ok'

bash -c '.venv/bin/python scripts/evaluate.py --base --experiment configs/experiments/kd_lora_ce_hi_8b_rag.yaml && mv runs/base-eval-full runs/base-eval-full-8b && .venv/bin/python scripts/premise_gate.py runs/base-eval-full-8b/recite.json 0.7 && touch runs/.premise_8b_ok'

bash -c '.venv/bin/python scripts/evaluate.py --base --experiment configs/experiments/kd_lora_ce_hi_14b_rag.yaml && mv runs/base-eval-full runs/base-eval-full-14b && .venv/bin/python scripts/premise_gate.py runs/base-eval-full-14b/recite.json 0.7 && touch runs/.premise_14b_ok'

column1: # --- Tier-2 scale runs: hi recipe (KD + CE 0.5, lr 1e-4, LoRA, online teacher), gated on premise ---
# --- foundation rebuilds (checkpoints the backlog analyses + warm-start need; also new-hardware replication) ---
# --- watchdog backlog: localization analyses + bf16 remeasure + 1.7B curve point ---
# --- champion LoRA rebuilds (cheap, keeps best checkpoints available on this machine) ---
# --- teacher-ceiling diagnostics for the new models (bottom filler) ---
# --- teacher ceiling (RAG-grounded accuracy of the UNTUNED model) for the small models ---
# --- v3 catechism arm (online teacher, no cache) ---
# --- tail-CE hybrid: the lens-finding bet (storage is local-trainable; readout needs a joint tail window) ---
